description: Per-row HTTP request whose URL comes from a column; appends body / status / parsed JSON. Drop-in for Alteryx's Download tool.

inputs.description: Upstream DataFrame whose `url_column` holds the per-row URL

upstream_asset_key.label: Upstream Asset Key
upstream_asset_key.description: Upstream asset key providing a DataFrame

url_column.label: URL Column
url_column.description: Column whose value is the URL to fetch for each row

headers.label: Headers
headers.description: Static headers sent with every request (e.g. Authorization)

retries.label: Retries
retries.description: Retry count per request on 5xx / connection errors (with exponential backoff)

output_prefix.label: Output Prefix
output_prefix.description: Prefix for the three output columns: <prefix>_body, <prefix>_status, <prefix>_json

parse_json.label: Parse JSON
parse_json.description: Parse the response body as JSON when content-type looks like JSON
